lines.hearsay: Somebody at {place} wanted a sack carried, and would not carry it.
lines.gossip: {A} handed {B} the flour errand at {place} to carry up to the board — sooner pay for it than walk to the mill and give {A}'s own rival the satisfaction.
lines.report: {A} consigned a flour errand to {B} for posting at {place}, slot {slot}.
